EXTENSION.NAME: Add Location
EXTENSION.DESCRIPTION: Import large areas. Control the mesh density of the terrain. View North and your location in SketchUp
EXTENSION.COMPATIBILITY_ISSUE:
Attention: Add Location compatibility issue.

Add Location is currently disabled on your version of SketchUp.
It is designed to work on the latest version.
We recommend upgrading your SketchUp to the latest version to ensure optimal performance and access to all features.
The latest version can be downloaded from the official SketchUp website.
Please contact our support team for assistance if you have questions or encounter issues during the upgrade process.
TOOLBAR_TOOL_DESCRIPTION: Set your location and import maps and terrain
TRUE_NORTH_MENU_ITEM_DESCRIPTION: Toggle the display of the real-world north direction on your model
MAP_PIN_MENU_ITEM_DESCRIPTION: Toggle the display of a real-world coordinates point on your model
MAP_PIN_OVERLAY_DESCRIPTION: The location pin associates the SketchUp model origin with a real-world point
